name: Agape Academy Dunwoody
description: Agape Academy Dunwoody is a place to play pickleball in Dunwoody, GA. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.
fees: Fee required — Open to the public and reservable online at www.agapetennisacademy.com

name: Arrow creek
description: First come first serve with the official opening in September but open now

name: Avondale Estates
description: Courts have been resurfaced to now have permanent pickleball lines on both sides of two tennis courts (4 total pickleball courts with pickleball nets on wheels).

name: Beulah Family Life Center
description: Beulah Family Life Center is a place to play pickleball in Decatur, GA. There are 5 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Browns Mill Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Browns Mill Recreation Center in Stonecrest, GA! There are 5 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and trainers or lessons.

name: Chamblee Racquet & Paddle
description: Chamblee Racquet & Paddle is a place to play pickleball in Chamblee, GA. There are 10 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming.
fees: Private — Discounted Court and Programming Fees Through Membership Available / Drop Ins Welcome

name: Decatur Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Decatur Family YMCA in Decatur, GA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: DeKalb Tennis and Pickleball Center
description: Come play pickleball at DeKalb Tennis and Pickleball Center in Decatur, GA! There are 10 outdoor hard, grass, clay, carpet, and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights, restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, water, locker rooms, trainers or lessons, youth programming, and adaptive programming.
fees: Fee required — You can reserve courts or join open plays for a fee. There is also a membership option but it’s only limited to the mornings on MWF.

name: Dottie Bridges courts at Flat Shoals Park
description: Dottie Bridges courts at Flat Shoals Park is a place to play pickleball in Decatur, GA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Scott Park
description: Scott Park is a place to play pickleball in Decatur, GA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.
fees: Members only — $5 per hour before 6pm. $10 per hour after 6pm.

name: Tucker Recreation Center
description: Call before going. 4704810205.  Schedule changes sometimes with no website update.
open_play_schedule: Open play only on Tuesdays and Thursdays
